title: Portal's Lunch Box
description: A silly Vanilla friendly mod pack Portal made for himself and others.
body:
## This modpack focuses on enhancing performance, introducing quality-of-life improvements, and subtly tweaking visual elements to create a much better SMP experience!


### Some of the most notable features include:


- Improved Performance and Chunk Management (especially on Nvidia GPUs). NOTE: If you're not using an Nvidia GPU, you can disable/remove Nvidium from the mod pack.

- Shader Support with Iris, featuring a built-in shader browser!

- Additional Graphics Options.

- Various Animation Changes.

- Improved Mouse Usage for Inventories.

- Enhanced Chat Menu.

- DARK MODE LOADING SCREEN!

- **And Much More!**

## Mod List As Of 1.0.0
